body_txt: Why eat it? Shoot it! A Sub-Trope of Abnormal Ammo , Edible Ammunition is basically any type of food used as ammo, whether it be thrown or launched. Depending on how it's prepared, it may have additional effects. Especially effective if it was prepared by the Lethal Chef . These attacks are often a trademark of Anthropomorphic Food creatures inhabiting a Level Ate . See also Edible Bludgeon , Food Fight , and Food Slap . Sub-Tropes include Pie in the Face , Produce Pelting , Projectile Toast and Proj-egg-tile .
